deep_dive.title: ReRAM-aware Model Finetuning addressing I-V Non-linearity and Retention Errors
deep_dive.abstract: Traditional CPU, GPU, and NPU architectures are increasingly limited by the von Neumann bottleneck. While In-Memory Computing (IMC) using ReRAM crossbar arrays offers a high-density, energy-efficient alternative, its practical deployment is constrained through their non-idealities. Existing hardware-aware training frameworks often require training from scratch, which is computationally prohibitive for modern large-scale models. In this work, we propose a finetuning-based hardware-aware training algorithm that enables robust DNN deployment on ReRAM with minimal training overhead. Our approach mitigates I-V non-linearity by applying a range-shrunk sinh transformation and incorporates retention errors directly into a regularization loss during the finetuning process. We evaluate our framework across models and tasks such as image classification and question-answering (QA). Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves similar accuracy on large-scale models like ResNet18 and DeiT-Tiny as the base model. In-case of ImageNet for MobileNetV3 families the technique has only less than 2% accuracy degradation. Further, applying the technique on the SQuAD v2 dataset results in only 1 point degradation of F-1 score.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: ReRAM-based In-Memory Computing for energy-efficient DNN deployment
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于ReRAM的内存计算用于高效DNN部署
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于ReRAM的内存计算用于高效DNN部署
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于ReRAM的内存计算用于高效DNN部署
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes finetuning-based hardware-aware training to overcome I-V non-linearity and retention errors in ReRAM crossbar arrays, enabling robust compute-in-memory for DNNs with minimal overhead.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文指出传统CPU/GPU/NPU受限于冯诺依曼瓶颈，而基于ReRAM交叉阵列的内存计算（IMC）是高密度、高能效的替代方案，但存在非理想性。现有方法需从头训练，计算开销大。本文提出基于微调的硬件感知训练算法，通过范围收缩的双曲正弦变换缓解I-V非线性，并将保持误差直接纳入正则化损失，从而在微调过程中使模型适应ReRAM非理想性。实验表明该方法能显著提升部署鲁棒性，且仅需微调而非重训练。该工作为大规模模型在ReRAM上的部署提供了实用解决方案，推动了计算-内存融合架构的实际应用。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文指出传统CPU/GPU/NPU受限于冯诺依曼瓶颈，而基于ReRAM交叉阵列的内存计算（IMC）是高密度、高能效的替代方案，但存在非理想性。现有方法需从头训练，计算开销大。本文提出基于微调的硬件感知训练算法，通过范围收缩的双曲正弦变换缓解I-V非线性，并将保持误差直接纳入正则化损失，从而在微调过程中使模型适应ReRAM非理想性。实验表明该方法能显著提升部署鲁棒性，且仅需微调而非重训练。该工作为大规模模型在ReRAM上的部署提供了实用解决方案，推动了计算-内存融合架构的实际应用。
